title: strychnos mitscherlichii var. pubescentior
intro: Strychnos mitscherlichii var. pubescentior, also known as the West African strychnine tree, is a plant species of the genus Strychnos, characterized by its toxic alkaloid content. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Strychnos mitscherlichii var. pubescentior include its potential in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant may be made into infusions, decoctions, or ointments, although caution should be exercised due to its toxic alkaloids.
